mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message (session_id, role, content, sources_json) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{sourcesJson})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM chat_message WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, session_id, role, content, sources_json, create_time FROM chat_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY create_time ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_message SET content = #{content} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}
